bead.title: F (Foundation): Operation pattern + IDGenerator + sentinels + ctx access: part 4
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Parent bead ddx-c6317784 is too broad for one execution pass. This child owns part 4 of 5 of that parent scope.

ROOT CAUSE
# PROBLEM
The bead backend interface today (`cli/internal/bead/backend.go`) is JSONL-shaped: `RawBackend` requires whole-corpus `ReadAll`/`WriteAll`, and `Backend` declares only 22 of `*Store`'s 69 public methods. Per TD-027 (the canonical Bead Storage System and Lifecycle spec), the bead architecture needs:

- A typed `Operation` pattern with `Apply(b *Bead) error` (CAS via error returns)
- 11 LSP-clean storage sub-interfaces composing `Backend`
- Pluggable `IDGenerator` and parallel `LifecycleSubscriber`
- `context.Context` first-parameter discipline on every interface method
- Sentinel errors (`ErrNotFound`, `ErrConflict`, `ErrInvalidID`, `ErrAlreadyClaimed`, `ErrNotClaimedByOwner`, `ErrUnsupported`)
- The optional `OperationApplier` interface on `RawBackend` so JSONL backends can preserve heartbeat sidecar optimization
- A canonical Bead data model (field enumeration + invariants + JSONL wire format + schema-versioning policy)

This bead lays the foundation that all per-concern beads (L/C/E/X/Q/D/A/MIG) depend on. It declares the event reader/writer interfaces but deliberately does not migrate `AppendEvent`, `Events`, or `EventsByKind`; the E bead owns event-method ctx threading and `*Store` event interface satisfaction.

# ROOT CAUSE
- `cli/internal/bead/backend.go:10-67` â€” `RawBackend` (4 whole-corpus methods) + `Backend` (22 high-level methods, incomplete).
- `cli/internal/bead/store.go` â€” `*Store` exposes 69 public methods, none take `ctx context.Context`.
- `cli/internal/bead/axon_backend.go:340-381` â€” `WriteAll` ships entire corpus per mutation (catastrophic for Postgres).
- Operation pattern, IDGenerator, sentinel errors, context discipline â€” all absent.
- Bead data model (the canonical schema of fields + invariants) â€” only implicit in the Go struct.

# PROPOSED FIX
Implement TD-027 Â§5â€“Â§13 foundation pieces that are required before the per-concern beads can execute.

## New files

1. `cli/internal/bead/operation.go` â€” `Operation` interface with `Apply(b *Bead) error`. `MutateFunc` adapter for ad-hoc mutations. Empty named-op section (per-concern beads add their op types).
2. `cli/internal/bead/id.go` â€” `ValidateID`, format constants (`DefaultIDPrefix`, `MaxIDLength`, `MinIDLength`), `IDGenerator` interface, `RandomHexIDGenerator`, `SequentialIDGenerator`, `NewIDGenerator()` default.
3. `cli/internal/bead/errors.go` â€” sentinel e
...[truncated]

PROPOSED FIX
Implement only this child acceptance slice:
- Legacy format handling: beads with `schema_version` absent in JSONL read as `schema_version=1` per TD-027 Â§11.4. Test: `TestBead_LegacyFormat_ReadsAsV1`.
- Every caller that uses Init/ReadAll/Get/Create/Update/Close/GenID passes ctx through. No `*Store.Init()` (no-ctx) calls remain in production code outside test fixtures. Event callers are intentionally excluded and handled by E.
- `RawBackend` docstring updated with the warning text from TD-027 Â§6.2 directing new backends to implement `Backend` directly.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement parent acceptance criteria assigned to sibling child beads. Preserve every parent non-scope constraint unless this child explicitly narrows it.
bead.acceptance:
1. Legacy format handling: beads with `schema_version` absent in JSONL read as `schema_version=1` per TD-027 Â§11.4. Test: `TestBead_LegacyFormat_ReadsAsV1`.
2. Every caller that uses Init/ReadAll/Get/Create/Update/Close/GenID passes ctx through. No `*Store.Init()` (no-ctx) calls remain in production code outside test fixtures. Event callers are intentionally excluded and handled by E.
3. `RawBackend` docstring updated with the warning text from TD-027 Â§6.2 directing new backends to implement `Backend` directly.

{"rationale":"The bead has a clear root cause, scoped non-scope, and at least one named test, but it is not fully execution-ready: the title is not imperative, acceptance criteria omit the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit` gates, and dependencies are left implicit instead of stated as `No deps.` or listed.","score":5,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative subsystem-scoped change.","Add explicit dependencies or state `No deps.` in the bead body.","Add acceptance criteria that name the package-level `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/...` command and `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Tighten the acceptance to explicitly assert the legacy-format reader path is exercised in the relevant test."],"waivers_applied":[]}
